nasb.text: and the opening of the robe was at the top in the center, as the opening of a coat of mail, with a binding all around its opening, so that it would not be torn.

esv.text: and the opening of the robe in it was like the opening in a garment, with a binding around the opening, so that it might not tear.

cnv.text: 在外袍的中間有一領口，如同戰袍的領口，領口的周圍有領邊，免得領口破裂。

ccb.text: 上面有领口，领口上织领边，像铠甲上的领口一样，免得领口破裂。
